title: Rapist sentenced to 24 years imprisonment
description: GEORGE NEWS - Members of the George Family...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Members of the George Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual offences (FCS) unit secured a 24-year imprisonment after a man (24) raped his 14-year-old cousin on a farm in Herold in October 2022.

According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sgt Chris Spies, the investigation revealed that the girl's mother granted permission for the victim to accompany her cousin to a nearby house.


> The cousins had close family ties and it wasn't strange for them to spend time together.


Upon their return, the man lured the girl into bushes where he raped her. She reported the incident to her mother on arrival at home.

The matter was reported to local police and an investigation commenced.

Police later arrested the man and charged him for rape.

The accused was found guilty and was sentenced at the Thembalethu Regional Court on 27 March this year. His particulars were also added into the sexual offences register.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
